basicDetails.schemeName: Mukhyamantri Ati Pichhada Varg Udyami Yojana

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md:
The “Mukhyamantri Ati Pichhada Varg Udyami Yojana” is a component of the umbrella scheme “Mukhyamantri Udyami Yojana”, launched by the Department of Industries, Bihar. The main objective of the scheme is to promote entrepreneurship and self-employment among individuals from all categories in the state.
Under this component, financial assistance of up to ₹10,00,000/- is provided to male applicants from the General Category and Backward Class for establishing and operating business ventures, thereby fostering economic growth and empowerment in the state.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - **Substantial Financial Support:** Up to ₹10,00,000/- for setting up a business (50% of the total financial assistance (up to ₹5,00,000/-) is provided as a non-repayable grant. The remaining 50% (up to ₹5,00,000/-) is offered as an interest-free loan, with a nominal 1% interest under specific sub-schemes.)  - **Skill Development:** Mandatory training sessions are provided to enhance entrepreneurial skills.
schemeContent.briefDescription: This is a flagship scheme of the Bihar government aimed at promoting entrepreneurship and self-employment among the youth by providing financial assistance of up to ₹10,00,000/- for setting up businesses.

children.text: The “Mukhyamantri Ati Pichhada Varg Udyami Yojana” is a component of the umbrella scheme “Mukhyamantri Udyami Yojana”, launched by the Department of Industries, Bihar. The main objective of the scheme is to promote entrepreneurship and self-employment among individuals from all categories in the state.

Under this component, financial assistance of up to ₹10,00,000/- is provided to male applicants from the General Category and Backward Class for establishing and operating business ventures, thereby fostering economic growth and empowerment in the state.

Up to ₹10,00,000/- for setting up a business (50% of the total financial assistance (up to ₹5,00,000/-) is provided as a non-repayable grant. The remaining 50% (up to ₹5,00,000/-) is offered as an interest-free loan, with a nominal 1% interest under specific sub-schemes.)
Mandatory training sessions are provided to enhance entrepreneurial skills.

applicationProcess.process_md:
> **Registration Process:**

**Step 1:** Visit the official [website ](https://udyamiuser.bihar.gov.in/login)and click on "[Registration/Log in](https://udyami.bihar.gov.in/mmuy)". Select "Mukhyamantri Udyami Yojana" as "MMUY".
**Step 2:** A new page will open where you need to enter your Aadhaar number and create a desired password.
**Step 3:** Click on the "Login" option after entering the details.
**Step 4:**A registration form will appear. Fill in the required details carefully.
**Step 5:** Once completed, click on the "Submit" button to finalize your registration.
> **Application Process:**

**Step 1:** After successful registration, [log in](https://udyamiuser.bihar.gov.in/login) to the portal using your Aadhaar number and password.
**Step 2:** The application form will appear on your dashboard. Fill in the form accurately with all the necessary details.
**Step 3:** Upload all the required documents as specified in the instructions.
**Step 4:** Review the application to ensure all information is correct.
**Step 5:** Click on the "Submit" button to complete the application process.
**Step 6:** Download and print the acknowledgment receipt for your records. Keep it safe for future correspondence.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. The applicant must be a permanent resident of Bihar.
   1. The applicant must belong to Extremely Backward Classes.
   1. The applicant should have passed at least 10+2, Intermediate, ITI, Polytechnic Diploma, or equivalent.
   1. The applicant must be aged between 18 and 50 years.
   1. The business unit must be a proprietorship or partnership firm.

children.text: The applicant must be a permanent resident of Bihar.
The applicant must belong to Extremely Backward Classes.
The applicant should have passed at least 10+2, Intermediate, ITI, Polytechnic Diploma, or equivalent.
The applicant must be aged between 18 and 50 years.
The business unit must be a proprietorship or partnership firm.
